variance_drivers.narrative: EU volume 22% below plan; competitor priced below us
Discounting deeper than modeled to defend wins
Launch slipped 2 months on regulatory approvals

decisions_to_revisit: Built ramp curve from US precedent; EU dynamics differ
verdict_conditions: Add competitor-response sensitivity to all future memos
Use region-specific ramp curves, not US precedent

lessons.criteria_update: Add to capex memo template stage 2

lessons.lesson: Regulatory timing buffer needed for EU launches

go_forward_decision: continue at reduced pace; reallocate 30% of remaining capital to platform v3
